CDP /json/version WebSocket URL could pivot to untrusted second-hop targets.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.5`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.5`

## Impact

A browser profile could trust a CDP `/json/version` response whose `webSocketDebuggerUrl` pointed at a different host, enabling a second-hop SSRF-style pivot.

## Technical Details

The fix normalizes and re-validates direct CDP WebSocket targets before connecting.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #60469. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.5`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `bc356cc8c2beaa747c71dd86cceab8f804699665`
- PR: #60469

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.5 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @tdjackey for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00265, "percentile": 0.17673}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f7fh-qg34-x2xh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T22:18:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f7fh-qg34-x2xh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f7fh-qg34-x2xh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43576"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T22:18:28Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-f7fh-qg34-x2xh", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60469", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/bc356cc8c2beaa747c71dd86cceab8f804699665", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43576", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-second-hop-ssrf-via-cdp-json-version-websocket-url", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f7fh-qg34-x2xh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-f7fh-qg34-x2xh", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: CDP /json/version WebSocket URL could pivot to untrusted second-hop targets", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T13:34:50Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f7fh-qg34-x2xh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: CDP /json/version WebSocket URL could pivot to untrusted second-hop targets
